user_stories.title: Simulate Expert Debate
user_stories.i_want_to: simulate a discussion between specific guests on a topic
user_stories.so_that: I can see diverse perspectives and how different experts might disagree.
acceptance_criteria: User provides a topic or problem statement.
System retrieves relevant viewpoints/quotes for each selected guest.
LLM generates a script/dialogue where each persona argues their viewpoint based on their transcript data.
